since_last: 30% of 100 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.51%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 30% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.32% · BTC -2.38% · Gold -1.14% · Nasdaq100 -1.43%. 30% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.51%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.51%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -3.82%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at +12.76%
cards.body: Leaders: SKHY +12.76%, INTU +3.50%, TTD +2.43%, WDAY +2.25%, AAPL +1.84%. Laggards: APP -8.90%, ARM -8.50%, MRVL -6.56%, OKLO -5.17%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -5.11% at $137.88
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -5.11% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
